reasoning: The SOC2 control CC2.1 focuses on obtaining and using relevant, quality information to support internal control. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring comprehensive audit logging, which captures all relevant events and metadata, and retaining these logs for analysis. Additionally, enforcing RBAC with least privilege ensures that access to information is controlled and monitored, supporting the integrity and quality of information used for internal control.
title: CC2.1 COSO Principle 13: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control
